Case# CWErr.cwhtFeaturesNotSupportedErr

macOS 10.6+

```
case cwhtFeaturesNotSupportedErr
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/corewlan/cwerr/cwhtfeaturesnotsupportederr#Discussion)

Association was denied because the requesting station does not support HT features.
